title: Structurepile
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65b6c8efbd3ea91f80cf068e49e83d87ddfdd3b1.png)

A simple mod changes the generation of all structures, making them spawn at a much higher frequency than in vanilla. This overrides the default spacing/frequency of all structures, vanilla and modded/datapack structures, resulting in worlds coated from top to bottom in structures.

This mod is intended for challenge run playthroughs, and is not recommended for series long-term playthroughs or SMPs. You will likely experience higher loading times and/or performance issues due to the amount of structures being processed.
Enjoy, I made this for fun in an afternoon.

_This mod should work with all modded structures, but in turn may have unintended effects on mods that add structures._
